title: March 10th, 2022
body:
lyrics

lobster god

 i'm not here to get rich
i already struck gold
this just the ringing that my inner caverns can't hold
bringing up anything i can from the lode
whistle while i work
when i swing i get low
when my [legs](legs) get tired i sit on the floor
banging out shapes
everything i make glows
and when i get to the surface i give it to the world
give it a whirl
if you don't like it you can put it down
that's where it's from where it wants to be found
it's funky underground
and i get lucky cuz i get around
you don't need to trust me just listen to the sound
worth it's weight, pound for pound
and you can change it, melt it, mold it, make it new
love it, hate it, hold it, make it you
always wanted to be an idol
take it, own it, drape it over you
let the empire ogle over you
it's ok love, you don't need to remember the overview
there isn't one and you got shit to do
i know cuz you're living proof
and if this gold don't make your load miserable
you can have it to serve your magic
that's it
no contract, no habits
no contacts, no tracking
i'm good cuz i've had it
i saw more i'm goin back in

therapy
